name: Fresh Raspberry Curd
recipeIngredient: Several drops of Red Food Coloring (optional)
recipeInstructions:
1. In a food processor or blender, puree the raspberries with lemon juice until smooth.
2. Pour the mixture through a fine strainer into a measuring cup, discarding seeds. You should have 1/2 cup raspberry juice.
3. Melt butter in a 2- to 3-quart pan over medium heat.
4. Add the raspberry puree, sugar, and eggs to the melted butter. Stir constantly with a flexible spatula until the mixture thickens and smooths, about 10 minutes.
5. If desired, stir in red food coloring, a few drops at a time, until the desired shade is reached.
6. Allow the curd to cool before covering and refrigerating for up to 1 hour (or up to 1 week).
